title:
PROMPT 026: Smartphone вЂ” App Launch
в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
CANVAS: 1080Г—1920px (9:16 Vertical)
DURATION: 3.0s | LOOP: No
SVG: Smartphone device (12 paths: outer chassis rect rounded, inner screen rect, home bar rect, front camera dot, top speaker rect, volume button left, power button right, screen content: 4 app icon squares in 2Г—2 grid) вЂ” centered 540Г—920px, 180px tall

COLOR SPECIFICATION:
Background: #F8FAFC (near white)
Phone chassis fill: #1E293B (dark slate)
Phone chassis stroke: #334155 (2px)
Screen fill: #FFFFFF
Home bar fill: #94A3B8
Camera dot fill: #0F172A
Speaker fill: #475569
App icon 1 (top-left): #3B82F6 blue вЂ” 36Г—36px rounded rect
App icon 2 (top-right): #EF4444 red
App icon 3 (bottom-left): #10B981 green
App icon 4 (bottom-right): #F59E0B amber
Button fills: #334155

VISUAL LAYOUT:
Phone centered vertically. Screen content visible. Clean product shot aesthetic.

ANIMATION TIMELINE (3.0s total):
0вЂ“0.5s: Phone chassis fades in + scales 0.85 в†’ 1.0 (ease-out spring).
0.5вЂ“0.7s: Screen brightens (fill #F1F5F9 в†’ #FFFFFF, ease-out) вЂ” like screen turning on.
0.7вЂ“0.85s: Camera, speaker, home bar, buttons each fade in (0.04s stagger, opacity 0в†’1).
0.85вЂ“1.1s: App icons appear one by one (scale 0 в†’ 1.0, 0.1s stagger per icon, spring).
1.1вЂ“1.5s: One app icon (top-left, blue) scales up to 1.15 в†’ 1.0 (tap highlight, spring) + brief bright flash (#3B82F6 в†’ #FFFFFF в†’ #3B82F6).
1.5вЂ“2.0s: Screen glint: diagonal white strip sweeps across screen (opacity 0 в†’ 0.25 в†’ 0, ease-in-out).
2.0вЂ“3.0s: Hold. Phone has subtle float (Y 0 в†’ -10px в†’ 0, ease-in-out, 1s).

EASING CURVES:
- Entry spring: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- App pop: cubic-bezier(0.34, 1.56, 0.64, 1)
- Float: ease-in-out
